channel.title: CatWithCode - Home
channel.description: Blog for random computer stuff from my daily life. Girl from Germany. Work as a Software Developer. Programming, Linux, Hacking, Modding and tinkering.

item.title: Microphone to Speaker passthrough on Linux/WSL
item.description: Sometimes you want to use a device and watch a video at the same time and you need to use headphones. In such cases it would be useful to pass the sound through your computer to your headphones without some sort of external mixing because reasons. https://catwithcode.moe/Blog/2022.05.15_Microphone_to_Speaker/Microphone_to_Speaker.html

item.title: Unpack, Repack and Resign APKs/APPs
item.description: Sometimes it can be useful to make modifications to an Apps AndroidManifest.xml. https://catwithcode.moe/Blog/2022.05.08_Unpack_Repack_Resign_APK/Unpack_Repack_Resign_APK.html

item.title: Force/Manual Update on KaiOS Nokia-Phones
item.description: I had bought a Nokia 2720 Flip with KaiOS on it https://catwithcode.moe/Blog/2022.05.03-03_Nokia_Force_Update/Nokia_Force_Update.html

item.title: MonoGame with MGCB-Editor on a Rolling-Release Linux Distros
item.description: If you get the following Error when you are trying to use the MGCB-Editor: https://catwithcode.moe/Blog/2022.05.03-02_MonoGame_MGCB_Linux_Error/MonoGame_MGCB_Linux_Error.html

item.title: Hello World
item.description: This is my first website-Content i ever made.
